items.summary: Summer has only just begun, and plenty of people have noticed the increasing number of feathered visitors around their homes. Sure, you could hang some run-of-the-mill feeder in your yard and admire them from afar, or you could guarantee an up-close-and-personal experience that won’t scare them away – plus, there’s the option to subscribe and get in-depth, AI-supported facts, too. The Wansview Smart Bird Feeder with camera fills the need as a great addition to any tech lover’s or birder’s backyard, and it’s seeing some Father’s Day savings (including a bonus extra savings code) that brings things down to the lowest price of 2026 so far.

The smallest of these units is Bluetti’s AC70 768Wh Portable Power Station down at $312.55 shipped, after using the above code, which beats out Amazon by $16. Dropping down from its newer $359 MSRP (originally $599) since the brand permanently cut prices last month, we’ve seen discounts only going as low as $329 in 2026, which get all the better with our exclusive code. Jumping on this deal gives you a combined $46 markdown off the new going rate (and $286 off the original MSRP) for the best price we have tracked in 2026, only beaten out by the $299 low we last saw during Black Friday. items.title: Admire space engineering with LEGO’s Technic NASA Artemis rocket + 3-stage separation at new $48 low
items.summary:
LEGO Technic NASA Artemis Space Launch System Rocket set

Buy for $48 (Reg. $60)

What we love

If you are an astronomy lover, a STEM builder, or just love the Technic theme in general, this LEGO set is a great steal while down at a new $48 low price. Stacking up to 632 pieces, you’ll recreate a brick-built rendition of the NASA Artemis rocket, complete with its three-stage separation design: solid rocket boosters, core stage, then upper stage with Orion spacecraft.

The model receiving the biggest post-game deal (which took me one shot to earn) is Segway’s Max G2 Electric Scooter down at $594.99 shipped, after using the provided savings code at checkout, beating out Amazon by $155. Down from its $1,400 MSRP directly, and normally going for $1,000 at full price elsewhere, we’ve mostly seen discounts landing the costs between $750 and $700 in 2026, though there was an earlier fall to $650. After winning the simple on-page game, you score a $405 markdown off the going rate (and $805 off the MSRP) that lands it at the best price we have seen in 2026 and the second-lowest overall, beaten out by a one-time drop to $530 back in 2025. items.title: Stock up on AAA batteries for your everyday essentials while this Duracell 28-count value pack is just $13 ($0.46 ea.)
items.summary:
Duracell x Messi Limited Edition AAA Alkaline Batteries (Pack of 28)

Buy for $13 (Reg. $27)

What we love

Batteries are one of those household items that always seem to run out when you need them. This value pack includes 28 AAA units, helping you cover everything from remotes, toys, wireless accessories, flashlights, and other everyday devices. They work out to roughly $0.46 each at today’s discounted price, making this a great time to cash in and stock up.
